overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a cowboy hat and dark coat walking through a foggy, gas-lit historic town at night. The character transitions from wet cobblestone streets lined with iron fences into a landscaped park area featuring benches, flower beds, and a central stone fountain, surrounded by oak trees with Spanish moss.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street lined with iron fences and gas lamps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street between iron fences and historic buildings

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface reflecting warm gas lamp light
black wrought iron fence running along the left sidewalk
black wrought iron fence running along the right sidewalk
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
two-story wooden building with shuttered windows and porch
large oak trees with Spanish moss hanging from branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow cobblestone street at night, flanked by wrought iron fences and illuminated by warm gas lamps. Historic wooden buildings line the left side while oak trees with Spanish moss are visible beyond the fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped park path with benches and flower beds

events.description: turns right from cobblestone street through stone pillars into park entrance

agents.ego_description: turning right into the park and walking along the curved gravel path past benches and flower beds

notable_agents.action: sitting on a wooden bench facing the path

entered.detail: curved gravel walking path through landscaped garden
wooden park bench with metal armrests
raised beds with blooming flowers and shrubs

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a landscaped park, leaving the cobblestone street for a curved gravel path. The scene becomes denser with vegetation, featuring wooden benches, flower beds, and oak trees with Spanish moss. A person sits on a bench to the right as the character passes.

scene_state.functional_zone: central park plaza with tiered stone fountain

events.description: large tiered stone fountain comes into view in the center of the plaza
character curves right to walk around the fountain basin

agents.ego_description: approaching the central fountain and curving around its right side while heading toward the mansion

entered.detail: large circular tiered stone fountain with multiple water levels
large two-story mansion with wraparound porch and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza centered around a large tiered stone fountain. The character walks toward and around the fountain, with a historic mansion visible in the background. The gravel path continues past the fountain as the character moves deeper into the park.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow, gas-lit historic street into the open expanse of a landscaped park. It begins by trailing a character down a wet cobblestone path flanked by wrought iron fences and warm lamps, with Spanish moss-draped oaks looming in the periphery. As the character turns right, the environment shifts from the urban street to a curved gravel walkway winding through dense vegetation, flower beds, and wooden benches. The scene then opens into a wide plaza centered around a large tiered stone fountain, with a historic mansion emerging in the background. Finally, the camera continues to follow the character as they move around the fountain and deeper into the park's greenery.
